channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Residence Halls Close
item.description: Date: Saturday, May 9, 2026 12:00 PM - Residence halls will close at 12:00pm (noon) on May 9th. All residents will be expected to vacate their space by this time. Upon completion of an intersession housing form, graduating seniors may stay in their on-campus residence until 5:00pm, May 16th.
item.author: Students

item.title: Register for RPI’s Lavender Graduation
item.description: Join us in celebrating Rensselaer students of the LGBTQ+ community at Lavender Graduation! This is sure to be an inclusive and celebratory experience. We look forward to acknowledging your accomplishments and evolutions into college graduates of Rensselaer. Business casual recommended but come as you feel comfortable. Graduating students who wish to be recognized must register at the linked attached by Sunday, May 10. For Questions, email the LGBTQ+ Task Force at lgbtqtaskforce@rpi.edu.
item.author: Students

item.title: Register for RPI’s Intercultural Celebration on May 12!
item.description: Join us at the Intercultural Celebration, as part of RPI’s Graduating Student Week, this casual events recognizes and honors the achievements, experiences, and contributions of graduating students from a wide range of identities and backgrounds within the RPI community. Graduating students are invited to join this celebration to reflect on their journeys, connect with peers with Graduation Cap Decorating, Hors d’oeuvres, music, games, and Photo Ops with our RPI Banner! Register today!
item.author: Students

item.title: Finals Week Dining Specials
item.description: Join Rensselaer Dining for these specials across campus while you study or take a break from Finals! Brain Food - Mindful specials curated just for finals snacking. Available on rotation throughout the week at Commons. Late Night Library - Free coffee and cookies available at Library Cafe May 4th - 7th from 6pm-10pm while supplies last! Finals Survival Kits - available at Father’s throughout Finals Week! For more details, check out @RensselaerDining on social media.
item.author: Students

item.title: Finals Week Dining Hours of Operations
item.description: As finals week kicks off, please click the link above for retail and dining hours of operations across campus from May 4th through May 8th. Be sure to plan ahead! Good luck on Finals!
item.author: Students

item.title: President’s Commencement Colloquy
item.description: Date: Friday, May 15, 2026 3:30 PM - Join us for our annual President’s Commencement Colloquy, a lively conversation with our Commencement honorary degree recipients, The Honorable Dr. Darío Gil and Christine Ann Miller ’97 — two remarkable leaders at the forefront of science and health care. Doors open at 3 p.m. Colloquy begins at 3:30 p.m. and will be followed by a reception with refreshments in Evelyn’s Café. Free and open to the public. Registration required.
item.author: Community

item.title: Instructure/Canvas Data Incident
item.description: RPI has been notified by Instructure of a cybersecurity incident for their Canvas platform, the learning management system used for RPI at Work. The scope and extent of the cybersecurity incident remains under investigation. Instructure has confirmed that a criminal threat actor gained unauthorized access to certain user information associated with the Canvas platform, and the company is continuing to assess the full impact. For more information, please go to https://dotcio.rpi.edu/
item.author: Community

item.title: Changes for Submitting a LMS Summer 2026 Course Requests
item.description: Instructors - Please read the entire announcement, as there are changes in submitting a LMS request due to moving to Ultra Course View. You can find Ultra Videos and documentation on our LMS support site.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Heliocampus Summer 2026 Syllabus Available - Complete by June 1
item.description:
The HelioCampus syllabus module is now available for faculty to access for the summer. Based on the requirements from the Provost’s office, faculty should have their syllabi published in HelioCampus by June 1, 2026. HelioCampus will publish all syllabi automatically on June 8, 2026.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
